credits.starrailexpress.thank_you:
Thank you for playing the Harpy Express Murder Mystery DLC!
The Canyue Team spent a lot of time adding more features and content to this mod.
We have also added many new maps and classes!
If you like it and want to make videos or streams, please be sure to credit my channel, video, and mod page!
 Original Author - RAT / doctor4t 
DLC Author - Canyue Team 
This DLC is fully open source and free
game.player.stung: You felt something sting you while sleeping
game.player.toilet_poisoned: You feel numbness in your rear
game.start_error.game_running: Cannot start game: A game is already running. Please try from the lobby.

game.win.star.time: Killers ran out of time: Passengers win!
game.win.star.thief: The Thief escaped with the gold! The Thief wins!
item.starrailexpress.train_light.tooltip:
Enhanced version of vanilla [Lamp]
Invisible light affected by redstone and train blackout
item.starrailexpress.remote_redstone.too: Use a binding tool to bind two wireless redstones; transmits and amplifies redstone signals
block.starrailexpress.remote_redstone.to: Use a binding tool to bind two wireless redstones; transmits and amplifies redstone signals
message.block.starrailexpress.remote_red: Redstone signal received here will be transmitted to -> [%s]
block.starrailexpress.train_light.toolti:
Enhanced version of vanilla [Lamp]
Invisible light affected by redstone and train blackout
item.starrailexpress.binding_tool.toolti: Right-click camera to save position, then right-click monitor to bind
message.item.starrailexpress.binding_too: Zipline post selected, right-click another post to connect
All connections of this zipline post cleared
Zipline posts are too far apart (max %s blocks)
message.starrailexpress.zipline.not_enou: Not enough stamina to ride the zipline
message.item.starrailexpress.binding_too: Successfully added this wireless redstone's coordinates to the tool
Successfully bound wireless redstone! Coordinates in tool cleared. Connection: [%s]->[%s]
item.trainmurdermystery.monitor_broken.t: Turn off all surveillance cameras on the train!
item.trainmurdermystery.blackout.tooltip:
Turn off all lights on the train for 15-20 seconds
Use your Instinct [Left-Alt] to see your target in the dark
Activates immediately upon purchase, has a 5-minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.body_bag.tooltip:
Use on a corpse to bag and remove it
Single use, has a 5-minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.crowbar.tooltip: Use on any door to permanently open it
item.trainmurdermystery.derringer.toolti:
Aim, right-click and shoot
Can only shoot once, so make it count!
Bullet refills upon kill
item.trainmurdermystery.firecracker.tool:
Placed on the ground, explodes after 15 seconds
Can be used to simulate gunshots and lure others
item.trainmurdermystery.grenade.tooltip:
Right-click to throw, explodes on impact
Good for clearing crowds, but watch the blast radius!
Single use, has a 5-minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.sticky_grenade.t: Sticks to where it lands or to players, then explodes after a delay
Can be removed with defusal pliers when stuck to a player
item.trainmurdermystery.timed_grenade.to: Charge briefly before throwing; bounces when it hits blocks
item.trainmurdermystery.knife.tooltip:
Hold right-click and approach your victim
Has a 1-minute cooldown upon kill
Attack can knock back a player (no cooldown)
item.trainmurdermystery.lockpick.tooltip:
Use on any locked door to open it (no cooldown)
Sneak and use on a door to jam it for 1 minute (has a 3-minute cooldown)
item.trainmurdermystery.note.tooltip:
Write a message and pin it for others to see
Sneak to write a message, then use on a wall or floor to place
Not visible when held
item.trainmurdermystery.nunchuck.tooltip:
Left-click to knock left, right-click to knock right, Shift+Left-click to knock back
Knockback range 0.5 blocks, attack range 5 blocks
Knocking enemy into a block's side then attacking kills instantly
Attacking three times within 7 seconds kills
Nunchaku disappears upon kill and drops Revolver, has a 7-second cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.emoji_helmet.too: Displays an Emoji above the player's head when worn
Sneak + right-click to change Emoji currently: %s
item.trainmurdermystery.disguise_1.toolt: Right-click and consume one to gain a 30-second disguise, swapping your skin to appearance #1.
item.trainmurdermystery.disguise_2.toolt: Right-click and consume one to gain a 30-second disguise, swapping your skin to appearance #2.
item.trainmurdermystery.disguise_3.toolt: Right-click and consume one to gain a 30-second disguise, swapping your skin to appearance #3.
item.trainmurdermystery.defense_vial.too: Place in food or drink to give the next person who takes it a shield!
item.trainmurdermystery.weak_defense_via: Place in food or drink to give the next person a weak shield! The weak shield is temporary and only blocks one knife attack.
item.trainmurdermystery.poison_vial.tool: Sneakily place in food or drink to poison the next person who takes it
item.trainmurdermystery.psycho_mode.tool:
"Do you like hurting people?"
Hide your identity, allowing you to go on a bat-swinging rampage for 30 seconds
A full swing of the bat can kill, and cannot be cancelled during the duration
Activates immediately upon purchase, has a 5-minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.revolver.tooltip:
Aim, right-click and shoot
Killing a civilian causes you to drop it
item.trainmurdermystery.standard_revolve:
Aim, right-click and shoot
Never drops when hitting a player
item.trainmurdermystery.magnum_bullet.to:
Ammunition for the Sniper Rifle
Hold the Sniper Rifle and left-click the item in your inventory to load.
item.trainmurdermystery.scope.tooltip:
Telescopic sight for the Sniper Rifle
Hold the Sniper Rifle, sneak, and press the left mouse button to attach to the Sniper Rifle (no need to open inventory)
item.trainmurdermystery.sniper_rifle.too:
Long-range weapon with 200 blocks range
Left-click to fire, R to reload (6s)
Sneak + left-click to attach/detach Scope (2s)
With Scope attached: Right-click to toggle scope
Wait 4s between shots
Only penetrates barriers and barrier panels
Hits beyond 50 blocks ignore shields and kill instantly
item.trainmurdermystery.scorpion.tooltip: Sneakily place in a bed to poison the next person who tries to rest

item.starrailexpress.dnf_abyss_vial.tool: Experimental infection serum. Grants the holder abyssal abilities.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cornmeal_bag.to: Sneak + long press right-click on smoker to cook.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_flour_bag.toolt: Sneak + long press right-click on smoker to cook.
Right-click to spend %s blood to purchase.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_flying_knife.to: Can shoot through iron bars to kill target in sight, single-use.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_lockpick.toolti: Open door and leave repairable damage, 3 durability.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_crowbar.tooltip: Obtained at night, 300s cooldown, broken doors cannot be repaired.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_repair_tool.too: Right-click door broken by crowbar: repair crowbar damage. Sneak+right-click door: repair lockpick lock.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_paper_scrap.too: Write short messages and pass through corner holes.
message.dnf.item.killer_only: Only the Experiment Infected can use this.
message.dnf.killer.night_only: This knife only answers you at night.
message.dnf.killer.exchange_flying_knife: Blood condensed into a Throwing Knife. Remaining blood: %s
message.dnf.killer.exchange_lockpick: Blood condensed into a Lockpick. Remaining blood: %s
message.dnf.killer.aid_ready: One kill earned a chance to request aid.
message.dnf.killer.aid_not_ready: You need to complete a new kill first to request aid.
message.dnf.killer.aid_requested_lockpic: Aid requested: Lockpick will arrive the next night.
message.dnf.killer.aid_requested_gun: Aid requested: Single-use pistol will arrive the next night.
message.dnf.killer.aid_delivered_gun: Tonight's aid has arrived: Single-use pistol.
message.dnf.killer.knife_limit: This knife refuses to move again tonight.
message.dnf.killer.crowbar_limit: You have already forced open a door tonight.
message.dnf.killer.hunger_warning: Hunger gnaws at you. You must consume a corpse within two days.
message.dnf.killer.starved: You haven't consumed a corpse for too long. The infection backfires.
message.dnf.killer.ending: You feel yourself getting lighter. The fog around you no longer bothers you, as if merging with this place. You feel free. Those two monsters that scared you beckon. You realize you have become one of them.
message.dnf.flying_knife.no_target: Throwing knife found no target to hit.
message.dnf.lockpick.opened: The lock was picked by the Coagulation Lockpick. A Locksmith can repair this damage.
message.dnf.locksmith.blasted: This door was destroyed by a crowbar and cannot be repaired.
message.dnf.locksmith.need_tool: You need to craft a Repair Tool first.
message.dnf.locksmith.not_enough_san: Crafting a Repair Tool requires %s%% sanity.
message.dnf.crowbar.blasted: Door completely broken, cannot be repaired by Locksmith.
message.dnf.soldier.no_bullet: You have used up today's bullets.
message.dnf.soldier.demoted: You fired a gun during the day and have been demoted to Regular Prisoner.
message.dnf.soldier.baton_no_target: The Baton can only execute the voted target.
message.dnf.maniac.day: Day scatters you into a watching shadow.
message.dnf.maniac.night: Night gives you a body again.
message.dnf.maniac.stunned: The gunshot scatters you, you cannot reform until dawn.
message.dnf.room_intrusion.enter: Staying in someone else's room at night is forbidden. You will die after 30 seconds total.
message.dnf.room_intrusion.half: You have already spent 15 seconds in someone else's room.
message.dnf.room_intrusion.danger: Leave someone else's room now! Less than 5 seconds left.
message.dnf.room_intrusion.death: You stayed too long in someone else's room.
message.dnf.poisoner.night_only: Contamination can only be done at night.
message.dnf.poisoner.need_food: You need to hold Corn Gruel, Black Bread, or Meat to poison food.
message.dnf.poisoner.food_limit: Today's limit for contaminated food is %s.
message.dnf.poisoner.food_deposited: You put the contaminated food into the food box.
message.dnf.plate.chef_only: Only the Chef can put food on the plate.
message.dnf.plate.full: This plate can hold up to 3 foods.
message.dnf.plate.food_taken: Took one food item from the plate.
message.dnf.plate.no_food_to_poison: No food on the plate to poison.
message.dnf.plate.poisoned: You contaminated the food on the plate.
message.dnf.plate.detox_started: Detoxifying plate food. Keep still for 20 seconds.

gui.entity_interaction_block.psychos_des: Number of players currently in Psycho Mode

gui.entity_interaction_block.change_role: Change player's role to specified role, enter role ID
gui.entity_interaction_block.resurrect_d: Resurrect player corpses within specified radius centered on this block
gui.entity_interaction_block.game_win_de: Set victory message and end game immediately, default 'custom' if empty
gui.entity_interaction_block.coin_change: Add or subtract player's coins, positive to add, negative to subtract
gui.entity_interaction_block.give_effect: Give player specified status effect, enter effect ID, duration(seconds), amplifier(0 for level 1)
gui.entity_interaction_block.teleport_de: Teleport player to entity interaction block marked as teleport point, enter teleport point ID
gui.entity_interaction_block.item_cooldo: Put player's held item on cooldown, enter item ID (* for current held), cooldown time(seconds)
gui.entity_interaction_block.block_coold: Put this entity interaction block on cooldown, no conditions triggered during cooldown
gui.entity_interaction_block.clear_entit: Clear entities within specified radius centered on this block, * for any non-player entity
gui.entity_interaction_block.add_custom_: Add custom task, clear or keep current tasks based on setting, need task name and unique ID
gui.entity_interaction_block.complete_cu: Find and complete player's ongoing custom task by ID
gui.entity_interaction_block.add_extra_t: Add extra task without clearing current tasks
gui.entity_interaction_block.narrator_de: Send voice narration to player, true = interrupt current, false = queue
gui.entity_interaction_block.infect_desc: Cause the player to enter infection state, enter the tick count
gui.entity_interaction_block.redstone_si: When conditions are met, output redstone signal with specified strength to surrounding blocks
gui.entity_interaction_block.has_modifie: Enter the full modifier ID, e.g. starrailexpress:rebel

message.dnf.ending.survival: Seven nights passed, those alive escaped, but memories began to slip.
message.dnf.ending.wipeout: No ordinary survivors remained, this cycle was sated early.
message.dnf.ending.true: The star beneath was touched, the illusion shattered in daylight.
message.dnf.ending.redemption: You successfully fooled the mists and walked out of the prison, though you occasionally crave flesh, as if you never fully escaped that place's corruption.
book.dnf.rules.title: Abandoned Prison Seven Nights Rules
book.dnf.rules.common.1: General Rules\nThe prison is sealed by mist, nearly impossible to leave. Each morning, SAN resets to 30%%, then dirtiness/missing clothes penalty applies; starting SAN is 50%%. Eating and drinking are mandatory tasks.
book.dnf.rules.common.2: Meeting Rules\nOrdinary faction players report a corpse, consuming 20%% SAN and starting a meeting. Chef right-clicks corpse normally to process ingredients; sneak + right-click to report. Cleaning, chatting, eating, drinking restore SAN.
book.dnf.rules.killer.1: Killer\nYou are an experimental infection result, must eat at least one corpse every two days. Use knife at night, 50s cooldown on kill; crowbar 300s cooldown, doors broken by crowbar cannot be repaired.
book.dnf.rules.killer.2: Blood & Ending\nEach corpse consumed gives 10 blood, exchange for single-use throwing knife or 3-durability lockpick. Consume 1 Soldier, 1 Psychology Master, 1 Locksmith, and 2 Regular Prisoners to trigger personal ending: merge into mist, become one of the monsters.
book.dnf.rules.poisoner.1: Poisoner Origin\nYou were a chemical plant researcher. For money and status, you chose the wrong path. After being imprisoned, you became the warden's private poisoner, then got pulled deeper by the lab.
book.dnf.rules.poisoner.2: Poisoner Rules\nContaminate food at night; each poison kill grants a Toxic Heart and counts toward tally. After five poison kills, can contaminate next day's water source. DNF Poisoner is immune to own poison.
book.dnf.rules.poisoner.3: Redemption\nBring five Toxic Hearts to Chef who has found the Old Chef's diary, right-click to unlock formula: heart water heart / empty heart empty / heart bottle heart. Using Redemption formula to craft two potions triggers independent ending for Poisoner and Chef.
book.dnf.rules.chef.1: Chef\nMay be randomly selected as Chef at start, regular players can take over via Chef Hat. Chef can enter ingredient storage, make Corn Gruel, Black Bread, and Meat Rations, and check water source or food box for contamination. Work restores SAN.
book.dnf.rules.chef.2: Old Chef's Diary\nFind the Old Chef's diary in the configured cafeteria corner to meet the Poisoner. The diary mentions the Poisoner preserving materials for 'Redemption' potions, and the Old Chef constantly tried to poison living people.
book.dnf.rules.soldier.1: Soldier\nYou have a Baton and Revolver, only one bullet per day. Gunning down a non-Maniac during the day demotes you to Prisoner. After voting ends, the voted target is highlighted; Baton can execute with two hits.
book.dnf.rules.maniac.1: Maniac\nExists as a spectator during the day, becomes Maniac in his room at night with Speed II. Being shot stuns him for the entire night.
book.dnf.rules.psychologist.1: Psychology Master\nSpend 80%% SAN to check if a player has killed someone. This costly ability is best used around meetings to confirm key suspects.
book.dnf.rules.locksmith.1: Locksmith\nSpend 25%% SAN to craft a Repair Tool. Repair Tools only fix lockpick damage, cannot fix doors broken by Killer's crowbar.
book.dnf.rules.civilian.1: Regular Prisoner\nComplete daily tasks like eating/drinking to maintain SAN; optional tasks include cleaning library spider webs and prison dust. Only after defeating all infected will the mist lose interest and let survivors leave.
